````markdown
# Implementation Plan: UI Overhaul for Diving Analytics Platform

**Branch**: `002-ui-overhaul` | **Date**: 2025-12-01 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/002-ui-overhaul/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by the `/speckit.plan` command.

## Summary

Comprehensive UI overhaul focusing on competition-centric design, improved dive breakdown layout with proper judge columns, cumulative scoring display, penalty indicators, enhanced chart visualizations, and full CRUD operations for coach-friendly data management.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5.x, React 18.x, Next.js (Pages Router)  
**Primary Dependencies**: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Recharts, Framer Motion  
**Storage**: MySQL (via NestJS backend API)  
**Testing**: Playwright for E2E, Jest for unit tests  
**Target Platform**: Web (responsive: 375px mobile to 4K desktop)  
**Project Type**: Web application (monorepo with frontend/backend/worker)  
**Performance Goals**: Page load < 2s, Chart render < 500ms for 500 data points  
**Constraints**: WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility, dark/light theme support  
**Scale/Scope**: Up to 50 athletes per competition, 6-10 dives per athlete, 5-7 judges

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Constitution template is not configured - proceeding with standard practices.*

**Applied Principles:**
- ✅ Component-based architecture (React best practices)
- ✅ Type safety (TypeScript across all layers)
- ✅ Responsive design (mobile-first with Tailwind)
- ✅ API-first design (REST contracts defined)
- ✅ Testing coverage (Playwright E2E)

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/002-ui-overhaul/
├── plan.md              # This file
├── research.md          # Phase 0: Research findings
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1: Extended data model
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1: Development setup guide
├── contracts/           # Phase 1: API contract updates
│   └── api-extensions.yaml
└── tasks.md             # Phase 2: Implementation tasks (created by /speckit.tasks)
```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
frontend/
├── components/
│   ├── layout/
│   │   ├── header.tsx           # Update navigation (competition-first)
│   │   └── layout.tsx           # Main layout wrapper
│   ├── ui/                      # shadcn/ui components
│   ├── aceternity/              # Fancy UI components
│   ├── competition/             # NEW: Competition-specific components
│   │   ├── dive-breakdown-card.tsx
│   │   ├── judge-score-cell.tsx
│   │   ├── cumulative-column.tsx
│   │   ├── penalty-indicator.tsx
│   │   ├── edit-dive-modal.tsx
│   │   └── delete-confirm-dialog.tsx
│   ├── charts/                  # NEW: Enhanced chart components
│   │   ├── athlete-progression.tsx
│   │   ├── judge-consistency-heatmap.tsx
│   │   ├── score-distribution.tsx
│   │   ├── round-comparison-radar.tsx
│   │   └── difficulty-vs-score-scatter.tsx
│   ├── pdf-uploader.tsx
│   └── ocr-debug-viewer.tsx
├── pages/
│   ├── index.tsx                # REFACTOR: Competition-first homepage
│   ├── calculator.tsx           # NEW: Move calculator here
│   ├── competitions.tsx         # Existing
│   └── competitions/
│       └── [id].tsx             # REFACTOR: Enhanced detail view
├── lib/
│   ├── api.ts                   # Extend with CRUD operations
│   ├── utils.ts
│   └── scoring.ts               # NEW: Client-side score calculations
└── styles/
    └── globals.css

backend/
├── src/
│   └── modules/
│       └── ingestion/
│           ├── ingestion.controller.ts  # Add PATCH/DELETE endpoints
│           └── ingestion.service.ts
└── tests/

tests/
├── frontend/
│   ├── test_ui_overhaul.spec.ts        # NEW: UI overhaul tests
│   └── test_crud_operations.spec.ts    # NEW: CRUD tests
└── utils/
```

**Structure Decision**: Web application structure (Option 2) - existing monorepo layout with frontend/, backend/, worker/ directories. New components added under `frontend/components/competition/` and `frontend/components/charts/`.

## Complexity Tracking

| Aspect | Decision | Rationale |
|--------|----------|-----------|
| Chart library | Extend Recharts | Already integrated; sufficient for all planned visualizations |
| State management | React hooks (local) | No global state complexity needed; competition data fetched per-page |
| CRUD operations | REST API + optimistic UI | Simple, works with existing backend patterns |

````
